name: Search
description: Web search via pluggable backends. Free DDG/Brave/Bing scraping by default; optional Tavily / Brave Search API / Serper / Google CSE / Kagi / You.com when API keys are configured.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Web search. Auto-picks the best configured backend (Tavily > Brave API > Serper > Google CSE > Kagi > You.com), falling back to free DDG/Brave/Bing scraping when no API key is present. Returns deduplicated results with title, url, snippet, optional published_date and source_domain.

tools.name: search_news
tools.description: News-vertical search. Default time_range='w' (last week). Same backend selection as 'search'.

tools.name: search_images
tools.description: Image search via DuckDuckGo. Returns image_url, thumbnail_url, dimensions, source_domain.

tools.name: search_and_extract
tools.description: Run a search and Readability-extract the top N URLs in one call. Each enriched result includes 'markdown', 'title', 'byline', 'lang', 'word_count', and 'extracted'.

skills.name: osaurus-search
skills.description: Teaches the agent how to use the web search tools — DuckDuckGo / Brave / Bing scraping by default, optional API backends (Tavily, Brave Search API, Serper, Google CSE, Kagi, You.com).

secrets.label: Tavily API key
secrets.description: Get one at https://tavily.com (best free agent search; 1000 free queries/month).

secrets.label: Google CSE API key
secrets.description: Google Custom Search Engine API key.

secrets.label: Google CSE engine ID (cx)
secrets.description: Custom Search Engine ID. Required if GOOGLE_CSE_API_KEY is set.
